aliases: deploy GitLab CE with Docker Compose

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: GitLab 17.0 requires PostgreSQL 14+; GitLab 18.0 (2025) introduced new UI and Duo features

constraints: Docker for Windows is NOT supported -- use Docker on Linux or macOS for production
Minimum 4 GB RAM + 1 GB swap for GitLab CE; 8 GB RAM recommended for production (up to 500 users)
NEVER expose GitLab without TLS in production -- always set external_url to https:// and configure SSL certificates
Backup command does NOT back up gitlab-secrets.json -- you MUST back up /etc/gitlab/gitlab-secrets.json separately
Runner registration tokens are deprecated since GitLab 16.0 -- use runner authentication tokens from the UI instead
GITLAB_OMNIBUS_CONFIG settings are NOT written to gitlab.rb -- they are evaluated on container start only

skip_this_unit_if.use_instead: Use the official GitLab Helm Chart or GitLab Operator instead of Docker Compose
No Docker setup needed -- use gitlab.com directly
Replace gitlab/gitlab-ce with gitlab/gitlab-ee in the compose file

inputs_needed.question: Is this for local development or production?
Do you need HTTPS/SSL? If so, do you have your own certificates or want Let's Encrypt?
Do you need a GitLab Runner for CI/CD pipelines?
